summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PRIBEGA luxury beauty brand site refactoring. All requested features working correctly: removed bracket-style titles, removed sound/mute button, added new homepage sections (Why Stats, Quiz Button, Reviews, Instagram Grid, Academy Button), booking form, Academy page with 3-day schedule, 300€ price, training videos, and application form. Dual-language RU/EN toggle working perfectly.
passed_tests: Contact form submission API (POST /api/contact) - all validations pass
Academy application submission via contact endpoint
Homepage Hero Section with video background
Why PRIBEGA Stats Section (7+ years, 1000+ clients, individual approach)
Full Services Section with 4 categories (Brows, Lashes, Complex, Additional)
Portfolio Marquee with images and videos
Booking Form submission with success message
Academy Page - PRIBEGA ACADEMY heading displayed
Navigation to all pages (Home, About, Services, Academy, Contact, Quiz)
Language toggle RU↔EN changes all text correctly
seed_data_creation: Test contacts and quiz submissions created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major site refactoring features verified working. Backend APIs stable. Dual-language support fully functional. Contact form and Academy application forms successfully submit to MongoDB. No bracket-style titles or sound buttons present. Previous iteration_3 concerns about hero subtitle addressed - subtitle is part of design.

mocked_apis.note: Contact form and Academy form endpoints store data in MongoDB but do NOT send email notifications - email sending is MOCKED/not implemented
